title: NEEDYMEDS - 211info
text: NEEDYMEDS NEEDYMEDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Website and helpline offering information on programs that help people who cannot afford medications and health care costs, including pharmaceutical patient assistance programs, diagnosis-based assistance programs, free/low-cost/sliding scale clinics, drug discount coupons, camps and scholarships offered for a specific diagnosis, and state programs. Also offers information on lower-cost MRIs and CAT scans and an advocate program for people who are struggling with medical bills. NeedyMeds also runs a drug discount card program that can save people up to 80% on prescription drugs, over-the-counter medications, and medical supplies when written on a prescription blank, and pet prescription drugs purchased at a pharmacy. Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Helpline: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Email - (800) 503-6897 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (800) 503-6897 Helpline Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Prescription Drug Discount Cards Prescription Drug Patient Assistance Programs Specialized Information and Referral * Health Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
